default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Augment Code's growth progress and discuss the development of the Auggie CLI feature.](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy is evolving; team to share coherent plan for next few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Auggie CLI development is progressing; frontend mostly ready, backend details to be finalized](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Launch timeline for Auggie CLI adjusted to next week for internal testing, public release week after](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [In-depth strategy discussion scheduled for next Wednesday at GrowthX office](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Team close to finalizing coherent content strategy for coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Direct traffic anomaly detected, likely bot activity; filtered out without impacting signup numbers](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Growth trends positive; ChatGPT remains challenging to crack compared to Perplexity and Gemini](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Sylvain requested analysis of top-performing content clusters for potential doubling down](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

### Auggie CLI Development

  - [Frontend mostly complete, awaiting integration of download count feature](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Sanity CMS used for managing commands, categories, and tags](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [FAQ section added per command for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Hosting and data management decisions:](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [Markdown files to be returned by endpoint, stored locally by CLI tool](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [Download count feature postponed for V1 launch](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [Chris to confirm technical implementation details](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)

### Launch Timeline and Content

  - [Launch delayed by a week; internal testing next week, potential public share week after](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [AJ to be first user for testing and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Sylvain to have dev rel review and expand command list in shared spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

### Analytics Dashboard

  - [Development of automated stats dashboard delayed due to resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Screenshots to be used temporarily until automation is complete](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ed to initiate Slack thread with Chris to confirm Auggie CLI technical implementation details](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Sylvain to have dev rel review and expand Auggie CLI command list](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Jason to continue building workflows for Auggie CLI in the background](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Sylvain to prepare and share pre-read on target metrics before next week's strategy meeting](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Strategy meeting scheduled for next Wednesday at GrowthX office](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Team to focus on shipping Auggie CLI V1 and refining content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/m5NHDdXtS_FMqtqDrTQVt2c1uUQ_5L9B?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

action_items.description: Start Slack thread w/ Chris re: Auggie CLI tech details (markdown file return, input handling)
Ask dev rel to review command list in spreadsheet/JSON, add new commands
Create & send doc w/ target metrics (internal traffic etc) before next Wed meeting
